title: The data black hole at the center of AI
summary: Dwarkesh Patel argues that massive volumes of training data are the hidden driver of AI capabilities, using a metaphor of a data black hole at the center of AI systems. He contrasts human and AI sample efficiency and explores whether sample efficiency improvements matter relative to data scale.
